# Aziana

Aziana is a waterfront Asian fusion restaurant and bar at Bobby's Marina in Philipsburg, Sint Maarten.

## Core pages

- Homepage: https://aziana.sx/
- FAQ: https://aziana.sx/faq.html
- Menu PDF: https://aziana.sx/menus/Marina_Menu_2026.pdf
- AI knowledge seed: https://aziana.sx/ai-knowledge.json

## Business summary

Aziana serves sushi, sashimi, poke bowls, seafood, steaks, satay, snack platters and Chinese-Indonesian specialties.

Kitchen hours listed on the website are Monday to Saturday from 12:00 to 22:00. Sunday is listed as closed.

For time-sensitive guest requests such as same-day reservations, delivery availability, allergy-sensitive orders, event quotes, complaints or special arrangements, route guests to Aziana directly instead of inventing availability.

## Common guest actions

- Order online: use the Order Online button on the website.
- Reserve a table: use the Reserve a Table button on the website or contact Aziana directly.
- Events and catering: collect event date, guest count, budget, event type, food preferences and contact details.
- General inquiries: contact Aziana by phone, WhatsApp or email from the website.

## AIOS note

The file /ai-knowledge.json is a seed database for a future AIOS-powered Aziana assistant. It contains intent routing, common questions, answer confidence levels and safe handoff rules.
